summary: Cell-type-specific expression implies lower broad-tissue off-target risk; main liability is shared fibroblast/stromal expression in normal tissue. FDA FAERS adverse-event snapshot shows no boxed warnings for agents targeting CD276.
adverse_events: No FAERS boxed warning identified for CD276-targeting agents in the FDA database. Fibroblast/stromal co-expression is the primary off-target concern; tissue-restricted expression profile suggests manageable therapeutic index.
note: Illustrative cached value — off-target safety read combining specificity and FDA adverse-event signals.
